name: worksight
description: Bring WorkSight project delivery into Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, follow up, and move WorkSight project deliveries forward from Codex.
interface.longDescription: WorkSight helps delivery teams keep projects moving. From Codex, you can find active projects, understand what needs attention, review plans and time reporting, and follow up on project-agent tasks without leaving the flow of work. It gives consultants, project leads, and delivery managers a faster way to stay aligned on customers, commitments, capacity, and next actions across WorkSight.
defaultPrompt: Show active projects that need attention.
Summarize delivery status for my projects.
Review this week's time reporting by project.
